# AppLock.App.Options

**Device Management Profile**

The dictionary of options to set for the app.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppLock.App.Options
```

## Objects

- **AppLock.App.UserEnabledOptions**: The dictionary of user-editable options to set for the app.
